---
title: "score visualization"
author: "Sujashree Roy"
date: "2026-05-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
data <- read_excel("~/Downloads/SCORES.xlsx")
colnames(data) <- data[2,]
data <- data[-c(1,2),]
head(data)
```


```{r}
top3 <- data %>% slice_head(n = 3)
data$`Total Score` <- as.numeric(data$`Total Score`)
top3$`Total Score` <- as.numeric(top3$`Total Score`)
eblue = data[46,]
eblue
ggplot(top3, aes(x = `Company`, y = `Total Score`, fill = `Company`)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = as.numeric(eblue$`Total Score`), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = as.numeric(eblue$`Total Score`) + 5, label = "Eblue Score", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Top 3 Teams by Total Score", x = "Team Name", y = "Total Score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

top5 = data %>% slice_head(n = 5)
```


```{r}
# Load libraries
library(fmsb)
library(scales)

# Create the data frame
data <- data.frame(
  row.names = c("Max", "Min", "eBluesoft", "Dotsquares", "TechAhead Corp", "Aubergine Solutions"),
  
  Digital_Marketing = c(5, 1, 4, 5, 4, 4),
  AI_Solutions = c(5, 1, 2, 5, 5, 5),
  SEO = c(5, 1, 4, 5, 5, 4),
  Web_Development = c(5, 1, 4, 5, 5, 5),
  App_Development = c(5, 1, 4, 5, 5, 5),
  Graphic_Design = c(5, 1, 3, 4, 5, 5),
  Client_Strength = c(5, 1, 3, 5, 5, 5),
  Experience = c(5, 1, 4, 5, 4, 4)
)

# Define pretty colors (semi-transparent fill + solid lines)
colors_fill <- c(alpha("#1E88E5", 0.35),   # eBluesoft - Blue
                 alpha("#E53935", 0.35),   # Dotsquares - Red
                 alpha("#43A047", 0.35),   # TechAhead - Green
                 alpha("#FB8C00", 0.35))   # Aubergine - Orange

colors_line <- c("#1E88E5", "#E53935", "#43A047", "#FB8C00")

# Set graphic parameters for a cleaner look
par(mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1),   # margins (bottom, left, top, right)
    bg = "#FAFAFA",        # light grey background
    family = "sans")       # clean font

# Create the radar chart
radarchart(data,
           axistype = 1,
           
           # Grid settings
           cglcol = "#BDBDBD",     # grid line color
           cglty = 1,             # solid lines
           cglwd = 0.8,           # line width
           
           # Axis settings
           axislabcol = "#757575", # axis label color
           caxislabels = c("1", "2", "3", "4", "5"),
           calcex = 0.8,          # axis label size
           
           # Polygon settings
           pcol = colors_line,
           pfcol = colors_fill,
           plwd = 2.5,            # thicker lines
           plty = 1,              # solid
           
           # Title
           title = "",
           vlcex = 1.0)           # variable label size

# Add custom title
title(main = "Competitor Benchmark: eBluesoft vs Top 3",
      sub = "Scores (1 = Low, 5 = High)",
      cex.main = 1.5,
      cex.sub = 0.9,
      col.main = "#333333",
      font.main = 2)

# Add legend (positioned bottom right)
legend(x = 1.05, y = -0.05,
       legend = c("eBluesoft", "Dotsquares", "TechAhead Corp", "Aubergine Solutions"),
       bty = "n",
       pch = 15,
       col = colors_line,
       text.col = "#333333",
       cex = 0.9,
       pt.cex = 1.5,
       xpd = TRUE)

# Optional: Add a subtle note
mtext("Source: Internal Competitor Analysis | Based on Clutch & Website Data", 
      side = 1, line = 2, cex = 0.7, col = "#999999")
```
